creator: Razi Khan
source_text:
The best homemade Tuna Pasta Salad. High in protein, lower in calories, and easy to meal prep! Make it in 20 minutes!👇🏽
-
Pasta Salad:
• 2 cans tuna (I use @safecatchfoods , the only brand to test every fish for mercury)
• 2 cups cooked pasta
• 1 cup chopped cucumbers
• 1/2 cup chopped celery
• 1/4 cup chopped red onions
• 1/4 cup chopped green onions
• 1/2 cup chopped tomatoes
• 1/2 cup corn
-
Sauce:
• 1/2 cup fat free greek yogurt, plain
• 1/2 cup light mayo (or sour cream)
• 2 tbsp mustard (yellow or dijon)
• 1 tbsp any hot sauce
• 1 tbsp honey or sweetener
• 1/4 tsp salt and garlic powder (to taste)
-
-
#recipe #healthy #salad #tuna #safecatchpartner
